name: White Lily Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a large bowl, combine the flour and sugar.
3. Add the eggs, butter, Crisco, baking powder, milk, vanilla, and almond extract to the flour mixture.
4. Mix all ingredients until well combined.
5. Pour the batter into a greased cake pan.
6. Bake for 2 hours or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the cake to cool before serving.
